/opt/homebrew/bin/cmake -E rm -f CMakeFiles/BOOTX64.EFI.dir/objects.a
/opt/homebrew/bin/x86_64-w64-mingw32-ar qc CMakeFiles/BOOTX64.EFI.dir/objects.a @CMakeFiles/BOOTX64.EFI.dir/objects1.rsp
/opt/homebrew/bin/x86_64-w64-mingw32-g++ -shared -nostdlib -Wl,-dll -Wl,--subsystem,10 -e efi_main -Wl,--whole-archive CMakeFiles/BOOTX64.EFI.dir/objects.a -Wl,--no-whole-archive -o BOOTX64.EFI.exe -Wl,--out-implib,libBOOTX64.EFI.dll.a -Wl,--major-image-version,0,--minor-image-version,0 @CMakeFiles/BOOTX64.EFI.dir/linkLibs.rsp
